session.user: Change to /home/runner/work/erk/erk and execute: make fast-ci. Report all output including pass/fail status of each check.
session.assistant: I'll execute the `make fast-ci` command in the erk project directory and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Execute fast-ci Make target to run checks

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. âś“ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1728 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty --- All checks passed!
... [109 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here's the summary of all check results:
**FAILED CHECKS:**
1. **Prettier Check (FAILED)** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - Run Prettier with --write to fix
**PASSED CHECKS:**
- AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (0 violations) - Lint: All checks passed - Format Check: 1728 files already formatted - Markdown Check: OK - Exec Reference Check: OK (.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date) - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 5987 passed in 14.87s - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 5.83s - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.77s - Tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed (output cut off but passing)
**Root Cause:** The Prettier formatter has detected formatting issues in 2 markdown documentation files. The pipeline halted before completing the erk-mcp test output, but test execution appears to be passing.
